# omada_networks (Data Source)

Lists LAN networks (VLANs) for a site on the Omada controller.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Uses the provider's default site unless site or site_id is given.
data "omada_networks" "default" {}

output "networks" {
  value = data.omada_networks.default.networks
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `site` (String) Site name to query (resolved to an ID). Ignored if `site_id` is set.
- `site_id` (String) Site ID to query. Provide this or `site`; if neither is set, the provider's default site is used.

### Read-Only

- `networks` (Attributes List) The LAN networks defined on the site. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--networks))

<a id="nestedatt--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `networks`

Read-Only:

- `dhcp_enabled` (Boolean) Whether DHCP is enabled on the network.
- `gateway_subnet` (String) Gateway IP + subnet in CIDR notation.
- `id` (String) The network ID.
- `name` (String) The network name.
- `purpose` (String) The network purpose (`interface` or `vlan`).
- `vlan_id` (Number) The VLAN ID.
